what: Special-part CAPTION bank (the parts-inspect description box). The box renders a fixed 5-line window, so records keep enough trailing blank lines that a caption never bleeds into the next part's box. In-place, size-preserving edits.
note: jp reference strings in this bank are approximate: its dictionary macros resolve through a parts-local runtime dictionary.
